title: Model Compression Path
description: Build fluency in Model Compression inside AI Theory by moving from foundational terms into adjacent methods, variants, and extensions.

steps.title: Type I Error
steps.summary: Type I Error belongs to the AI Theory area of AI/ML, within Model Compression. It sits inside AI Theory / Model Compression. Compare it with Type II Error and Arize Phoenix. It opens into Type II Error.
steps.whyIncluded: Start here to anchor the vocabulary and core intuition for this area.

steps.title: Type II Error

steps.whyIncluded: Start here to anchor the vocabulary and core intuition for this area.

steps.title: Arize Phoenix
